response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and scanned for any on-screen text or lower-thirds indicating song titles or artist credits. None were found. Consequently, I could not identify the song title, original artist, or retrieve lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual character, Gigimurin, in a 3D environment performing an interactive game, with segments of dialogue and a continuous musical performance in English. The song seems to be an original composition related to the character's narrative. No specific official song metadata was provided on-screen.

scenes.description: The video starts with the character Gigimurin interacting in a 3D game environment. A musical performance begins immediately with English vocals. There is no on-screen text identifying the song.
